name: LoginForm
prompt: a login form with email input, password input, and a submit button

name: SearchBar
prompt: a search bar with a text input and a results dropdown that shows matching items below the input

name: PricingCard
prompt: a pricing card with 3 tiers: Basic, Pro, and Enterprise, where the middle Pro tier is visually highlighted

name: ProgressBar
prompt: a progress bar component that shows a filled bar and displays a percentage label like 75%

name: NavigationBar
prompt: a navigation bar with a logo on the left and 4 navigation links: Home, About, Services, and Contact

name: ModalDialog
prompt: a modal dialog with a title, a body text area, and a close button in the top-right corner with an overlay backdrop

name: DataTable
prompt: a data table with 3 columns (Name, Email, Role) and 5 rows of sample data with alternating row colors

name: ToggleSwitch
prompt: a toggle switch component with a label that shows the current state as On or Off

name: FileUploadDropzone
prompt: a file upload dropzone that accepts drag and drop files and shows a browse button to select files

name: ToastNotification
prompt: a success toast notification with a green checkmark icon, a success message text, and a dismiss button
